description_long: This house features a boxy, modern design with clean white exterior walls and large rectangular windows arranged in a regular pattern. The structure is divided into two main sections, each with its own open-plan interior visible through wide cutouts and glass. The front section includes a spacious wooden deck or porch area adorned with potted plants and bordered by railings, while the rear section appears to contain a kitchen and living space with visible furniture. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic, and the overall layout emphasizes open, airy spaces with ample natural light. The house is elevated slightly above ground level, with steps leading up to the main entrance. Minimalist detailing and a focus on geometric forms define the architectural style.
description: A modern, boxy white house with large windows, a flat roof, and a spacious wooden porch with potted plants. The open-plan interior and minimalist design emphasize light and space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden porch with potted plants, and three large windows.
description_view_1: Side and rear cutaway view revealing the open-plan kitchen and living area, with visible interior furnishings.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the rear section's open space and minimal window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side and rear cutaway view, showing the interior layout and a large open wall section.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps leading to a wooden porch, flanked by potted plants and large windows, minimalistic door design.
